MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The court vacated its tentatitive ruling:
Specially appearing defendant Patricia Hume's motion to quash service of summons due to lack of personal jurisdiction over her is taken off calendar per e-mail receved by the court this morning. The matter has settled. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
